title: Serpentine
content:
More fragment of tree
        than serpent
        clothed in wet
        he mirrors me
        bedraggled in stone
        cloak or so it seems
        this cavernous ledge coven.

        Is he witch's totem
        swimming at yard's length
        I can web reach him
        startling darts of rain
        cutting lagoon's edge
        this sedge & eel grass dragon.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Serpentine", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
